sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check game state
print(f"Level: {current_frame.level}")
print(f"Step: {current_frame.step}")
print(f"Last action result: {last_action_result}")
print(f"Valid actions: {valid_actions}")

# Check if there's a new level or if the game ended
cur_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']}
print(f"\nNumber of nodes: {len(cur_nodes)}")

# Check for bars
g_cur = [n for n in cur_nodes.values() if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] != 7]
y_cur = [n for n in cur_nodes.values() if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] != 7]
print(f"Green bars: {len(g_cur)}")
print(f"Yellow bars: {len(y_cur)}")

# Check all non-background objects
print("\nAll non-background objects:")
for n in cur_nodes.values():
    if n['pixels'] > 1 or n['color'] not in ['B', 'W']:
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
